skills.name: Slinger Ammo Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Slinger Capacity skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Slinger Capacity skill.

skills.name: True Critical Element
skills.description: Greatly increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

levels.description: Greatly increases elemental damage (fire, water, thunder, ice, dragon) when landing critical hits.

skills.name: Windproof
skills.description: Grants protection against wind pressure.

levels.description: Slightly reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Reduces the effects of minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure.
Negates minor wind pressure and reduces the effects of major wind pressure.
Negates minor and major wind pressure.

skills.name: Fire Attack
skills.description: Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Fire attack +30
Fire attack +60
Fire attack +100
Fire attack +5% Bonus: +100
Fire attack +10% Bonus: +100
Fire attack +20% Bonus: +100

skills.name: Critical Boost
skills.description: Increases the damage of critical hits.

levels.description: Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 30%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 35%.
Increases damage dealt by critical hits to 40%.

skills.name: Fire Attack
skills.description: Increases fire element attack power. (Elemental attack power has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Fire attack +30
Fire attack +60
Fire attack +100
Fire attack +5% Bonus: +100
Fire attack +10% Bonus: +100
Fire attack +20% Bonus: +100

skills.name: Slinger Capacity
skills.description: Increases loading capacity for slinger ammo obtained in the field. Limits the amount of ammo used when firing certain shots.

levels.description: Increases the loading capacity for slinger ammo collected from the ground or plants.
In addition, increases the loading capacity for some slinger ammo dropped by monsters.
In addition, increases the loading capacity for all slinger ammo dropped by monsters.
Increases the loading capacity for slinger ammo collected from the ground or plants even more.
Increases the loading capacity for all slinger ammo.
